bento.title: Jhapa Campus
bento.description: A purpose-built learning environment in the heart of Jhapa, Eastern Nepal.
bento.imageCaption: Premises of Nidi Secondary School & Indreni Campus

bento.title: Students Enrolled
bento.description: A growing community across IT and education technology programs.

bento.title: Industry Partners
bento.description: Collaborations that bring internships, mentorship, and placement support.

bento.title: Smart Facilities
bento.description: Labs, libraries, and collaborative spaces designed for active learning.
bento.imageCaption: Premises of Nidi Secondary School & Indreni Campus

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Rigorous academics aligned with Kathmandu University standards and industry expectations.

coreValues.title: Inclusivity
coreValues.description: Accessible education for students across Eastern Nepal and beyond, with scholarship support.

coreValues.title: Innovation
coreValues.description: Project-based learning, hackathons, and research exposure from day one.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Strong ties with local schools, businesses, and alumni who mentor the next generation.

milestones.title: Foundation established
milestones.description: WhiteHouse Education Foundation begins its mission to expand quality higher education in Eastern Nepal.

milestones.title: WCBT Jhapa Campus opens
milestones.description: The Jhapa campus launches with a focus on business and technology programs for the region.

milestones.title: Kathmandu University partnership
milestones.description: Formal academic partnership brings KU-affiliated BIT and B.Tech Ed IT programs to Jhapa.

milestones.title: Expanding innovation ecosystem
milestones.description: New labs, industry collaborations, and student-led initiatives strengthen the campus community.

leadership.name: Dr. Rajesh Sharma
leadership.bio: Leads academic strategy, faculty development, and partnerships with Kathmandu University and industry.

leadership.name: Sunita Karki
leadership.bio: Oversees curriculum delivery, student advising, and quality assurance across all programs.

leadership.name: Anil Thapa
leadership.bio: Connects students with internships, workshops, and career pathways through partner organizations.
